ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pitchers" (
  "pitcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the pitcher */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the pitcher belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the pitcher (e.g., Starting Pitcher, Relief Pitcher) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the pitcher */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the pitcher in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the pitcher in pounds */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Dominant throwing hand (e.g., Left, Right) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the pitcher */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience for the pitcher */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the pitcher was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the pitcher was drafted in */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Current contract status of the pitcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitching_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitching statistics entry */,
  "pitcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitcher */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team for the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, postseason) */,
  "ip" REAL /* Innings pitched */,
  "h" INTEGER /* Hits allowed */,
  "r" INTEGER /* Runs allowed */,
  "er" INTEGER /* Earned runs allowed */,
  "bb" INTEGER /* Walks issued */,
  "so" INTEGER /* Strikeouts */,
  "hr" INTEGER /* Home runs allowed */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average */,
  "win" INTEGER /* Whether the pitcher earned a win */,
  "loss" INTEGER /* Whether the pitcher earned a loss */,
  "save" INTEGER /* Whether the pitcher earned a save */,
  "holds" INTEGER /* Number of holds earned by the pitcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_statistics_pitcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitcher_id") REFERENCES pitchers ("pitcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season in which the game was played */,
  "game_number" INTEGER /* Game number in the season */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team for the game */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team for the game */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance for the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, scout, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
